content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-facing Settings toggle label says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12).
Pierre: Apple flags store-facing or in-app copy suggesting the shipped build is unfinished or a beta, as it undermines the "final product" expectation for App Store releases. This string is visible in the UI, not a code comment, and explicitly calls the feature experimental and unstable. Consider softening the wording (e.g. "New — sort order may change") or hardening the feature before release to avoid review questions.
